query: target_workspace/mcu_firmware/main.c reports unsupported kLPI2C_4PinUnidirectional on i.MX93. Which LPI2C configuration and driver files should be checked?
description: The retriever should find LPI2C manual context and SDK driver sources for the unsupported pin mode.

query: Yocto BitBake do_compile failed: ERROR: Nothing PROVIDES 'u-boot-imx'. Looking for the u-boot-imx_2023.04.bb recipe file and Yocto_04_Dev_Tasks.pdf for debugging missing dependencies and image deployment tasks.
description: 改寫為包含 'do_compile' 與具體 ERROR 訊息，引導 RAG 透過 Yocto_04_Dev_Tasks.pdf 找出除錯與佈署任務的上下文，並命中 .bb 檔案。

category: Device Tree and BSP Integration Errors
query: FATAL ERROR: syntax error parsing input tree in imx93-11x11-evk.dts at &lpi2c2 node. Need to retrieve imx93-11x11-evk.dts and IMX93_EVK_02_I2C_Interface.pdf to verify MX-I2C2 bus configuration for the PCA9451AHN PMIC at address 0x25.
description: 加入了從 EVK 手冊中萃取出的確切硬體元件 PCA9451AHN (PMIC) 與其 I2C 位址 0x25，這將大幅提升命中硬體規格書的機率。

query: MCU HardFault during boot. Call Trace points to fsl_lpi2c.c inside LPI2C_MasterInit. The firmware attempts to initialize LPI2C2 instead of LPI2C1. Retrieve fsl_lpi2c driver sources and IMX93_EVK_02_I2C_Interface.pdf to check pinouts for the WM8960 Audio codec (0x1A) on MX-I2C1 versus PMIC on MX-I2C2.
description: 針對上次 MRR=0 的情況進行了大幅度翻新。利用 QA Expert 萃取 Call Trace 的特性，將 Query 改為包含具體驅動程式名稱、音訊編解碼器 WM8960 以及位址 0x1A。這能迫使 RAG 捨棄無效的語意文章，直搗底層驅動程式碼與電路腳位表。
